.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #010e1a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#010e1a, color-mix(in srgb, #010e1a 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #010e1a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#010e1a, color-mix(in srgb, #010e1a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(158, 255, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 98, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 98, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(209, 151, 217, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 98, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 157, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(158, 255, 128, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(158, 255, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 157, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(1, 14, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(1, 14, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(237, 146, 153) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(237, 146, 153) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(255, 238, 128) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(0, 34, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(31, 70, 98) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(0, 136, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(1, 22, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
